title: The Lagoon Understanding-Pool

features.name: the peaceful house
features.desc-on-touch: a small shelter at the water's edge where reef and navigation have learned to speak to each other without argument; both are resting here

features.name: the lagoon's stillness
features.desc-on-touch: water so calm it holds both reflection and depth; the reef's refusals have become the water's patience; charts are no longer needed because the reef has learned to stay still

features.name: negotiation-archive
features.desc-on-touch: records of every passage that reef and chart learned to take together; the archive of their shared understanding, written in water-lines and stone

features.name: the sheltered dock
features.desc-on-touch: built structures where reef and navigator both rest; neither one teaching the other, both holding their own languages and finding them beautiful

features.name: the understanding-wave
features.desc-on-touch: a gentle motion through the lagoon that means: we have stopped trying to convince; we have learned that different languages can coexist

inscription: when the reef and navigation finally met, they discovered that stillness requires two kinds of knowing

file.name: Lagoon_Accord_Navigation_and_Reef_Partnership.txt
file.note: the agreement written in water; reef stops fighting the charts, charts stop trying to contain the reef; both learn that coexistence is a form of dialogue

exits.label: back to the reef navigation chamber, where negotiation still continues
deeper into the lagoon where understanding becomes silence
toward other waters where different languages have learned peace
